---
name: Documentation Request
about: Request new documentation or improvements to existing docs
labels: documentation
---

## Documentation Goal
<!-- Who reads this doc and what should they be able to do after reading it? -->
<!-- Example: "A new developer should be able to connect Claude Code to Orchemist in under 5 minutes" -->


## Document Title
<!-- The title of the document to create or update -->


## Target File
<!-- Where should this live? (e.g. docs/mcp-setup.md, README.md section) -->


## Requirements
<!-- What must this documentation cover? List the key sections or topics -->


## Accuracy Requirements
<!-- Code examples, commands, or configs that must be verified correct -->
<!-- Example: "All CLI commands must be tested against the actual orch CLI" -->


## Reference Material
<!-- What existing files, code, or docs should the writer read for accuracy? -->
<!-- Example: src/orchestration_engine/mcp/tools.py — for accurate tool signatures -->
